message:
Add high-level IO convenience fns, extend linalg norms/funm, new RNG distributions, and massive ufunc expansion

fnp-io:
- Add high-level save/load/savez/savez_compressed convenience functions
  matching np.save, np.load, np.savez, np.savez_compressed semantics
- NpzLoadedEntry type alias for load_npz return tuples
- Roundtrip tests for save/load, savez/load_npz, and savez_compressed

fnp-linalg:
- Add VectorNormOrder::Zero (count of nonzero elements) and VectorNormOrder::P(f64)
  for arbitrary p-norms with from_token parsing support
- Add MatrixNormOrder::NegOne and MatrixNormOrder::NegInf variants for minimum
  column-sum and minimum row-sum norms respectively
- Implement -1, -inf, and -2 (smallest singular value) norms in matrix_norm_nxn
- Implement NegOne and NegInf norms in matrix_norm_2x2
- Add funm_nxn: general matrix function f(A) via Schur decomposition
  (equivalent to scipy.linalg.funm), supporting matrices with real eigenvalues
- Update error message to list all supported norm orders
- Tests for zero-norm, arbitrary p-norm, negative norm variants, and funm
  (identity, diagonal, exp-vs-expm comparison)

fnp-random:
- Add Generator::integers_endpoint for inclusive-both-ends integer sampling
  (endpoint=True variant)
- Add Generator::permuted for axis-aware independent slice permutation
  (np.random.Generator.permuted) with Fisher-Yates per-slice shuffle
- Add Generator::f alias matching NumPy's rng.f(dfnum, dfden, size)
- Add Generator::halfnormal (folded normal |X| distribution)
- Add Generator::truncated_normal with rejection sampling on [low, high]
- Add Generator::lomax (Pareto Type II) distribution via inverse CDF
- Add Generator::levy distribution via inverse CDF method
- Tests for all new distributions covering bounds, shape, and aliasing

fnp-ufunc:
- Add UFuncArray property accessors: ndim, size, nbytes, itemsize, strides, t (transpose)
- Add accumulate and reduceat generic ufunc methods
- Extend partition/argpartition to support axis parameter (not just 1-D)
- Add comprehensive linalg bridge methods on UFuncArray: norm, lstsq,
  matrix_rank, matrix_power, tensorsolve, tensorinv, cholesky, det, slogdet,
  inv, pinv, solve, solve_multi, eig, eigvals, eigh, eigvalsh, svd, svdvals,
  qr, cond, lu_factor, solve_triangular, expm, sqrtm, logm, schur, polar
- Add advanced indexing: take, compress, fancy_index, boolean_index,
  boolean_set, fancy_set, take_along_axis, put_along_axis, extract, place, put
- Add index helpers: fill_diagonal, diag_indices, tril_indices, triu_indices,
  diag_indices_from, tril_indices_from, triu_indices_from
- Add dtype/layout conversion: astype, ascontiguousarray, asfortranarray, require
- Add logical reductions: any, all (with axis support), nonzero
- Add diff, isclose, allclose
- Add statistics: median, percentile, percentile_method, quantile_method,
  moment, skew, kurtosis, mode, entropy
- Add cumulative ops: cummin, cummax (with axis support)
- Add padding: pad (constant), pad_edge, pad_wrap
- Add MaskedArray type with full numpy.ma semantics: filled, compressed,
  fix_invalid, masked operations, clump_masked/unmasked, anom, shrink_mask,
  count_masked, average, take, and ma utility functions
- Add numpy.lib.financial equivalents: fv, pv, pmt, nper, npv, irr,
  ipmt, ppmt, mirr, rate
- Add CharArray (np.char) with full string operation suite: upper, lower,
  capitalize, title, strip/lstrip/rstrip, center/ljust/rjust, zfill, str_len,
  count_substr, find/rfind, startswith/endswith, replace, add, multiply,
  isalpha/isdigit/isalnum/isspace/isupper/islower, join, swapcase,
  split/rsplit, partition/rpartition, encode/decode, maketrans/translate,
  expandtabs, isnumeric/isdecimal/istitle, index/rindex, splitlines,
  mod_format, and comparison operators (equal/not_equal/greater/less etc.)
- Add fnp-linalg dependency to Cargo.toml for linalg bridge
- Update Cargo.lock with new dependency

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
